requirement_topic.en: Market access / certification — PSE mark (Electrical Appliance and Material Safety Act) applicability
requirement_topic.zh: 市场准入 / 认证 — PSE 标志（电气用品安全法）适用性
requirement_topic.zht: 市場准入 / 認證 — PSE 標誌（電氣用品安全法）適用性

summary.en: The Electrical Appliance and Material Safety Act (電気用品安全法, DENAN, Act No. 234 of 1961, as amended) regulates electrical appliances and materials sold in Japan. Products are listed in two categories: 'Specified Electrical Appliances and Materials' (特定電気用品, requiring third-party conformity certification — PSE diamond mark 菱形PSE) and 'Non-specified Electrical Appliances and Materials' (非特定電気用品, self-declaration — PSE circle mark 丸形PSE). Three-phase AC induction motors for industrial use (typically above 200 V, used in industrial machinery) are GENERALLY NOT listed in the DENAN schedules as regulated electrical appliances — meaning DENAN / PSE requirements do NOT apply to most industrial three-phase motors. [UNCERTAINTY FLAG: The DENAN scope lists should be verified for the specific motor type, voltage, and end-use application; some lower-voltage motors or motors incorporated into consumer products may fall under DENAN.] METI administers DENAN.
summary.zh: 《电气用品安全法》（電気用品安全法，DENAN，1961 年第 234 号法律及历次修订版）规范在日本销售的电气用品和材料，产品分为两类：「特定电气用品」（特定電気用品，须第三方合格认证——菱形 PSE 标志）和「非特定电气用品」（非特定電気用品，自我声明——丸形 PSE 标志）。用于工业用途的三相交流感应电机（通常电压 200 V 以上，用于工业机械）一般不列入 DENAN 附表中受管控的电气用品——即 DENAN / PSE 要求通常不适用于大多数工业三相电机。【不确定性标注：应就特定电机类型、电压及最终用途核查 DENAN 范围表；部分低压电机或集成入消费类产品中的电机可能在 DENAN 管辖范围内。】DENAN 由经济产业省（METI）主管。
summary.zht: 《電氣用品安全法》（電気用品安全法，DENAN，1961 年第 234 號法律及歷次修訂版）規範在日本銷售的電氣用品和材料，產品分為兩類：「特定電氣用品」（特定電気用品，須第三方合格認證——菱形 PSE 標誌）和「非特定電氣用品」（非特定電気用品，自我聲明——丸形 PSE 標誌）。用於工業用途的三相交流感應電機（通常電壓 200 V 以上，用於工業機械）一般不列入 DENAN 附表中受管控的電氣用品——即 DENAN / PSE 要求通常不適用於大多數工業三相電機。【不確定性標注：應就特定電機類型、電壓及最終用途核查 DENAN 範圍表；部分低壓電機或集成入消費類產品中的電機可能在 DENAN 管轄範圍內。】DENAN 由經濟產業省（METI）主管。

standards_or_laws: Electrical Appliance and Material Safety Act (電気用品安全法, DENAN, Act No. 234 of 1961, as amended)
METI DENAN product schedules (Appended Table 1 — Specified; Appended Table 2 — Non-specified)

summary.en: In China, the CCC (China Compulsory Certification) scheme administered by CNCA covers electrical products in mandatory categories. General industrial three-phase induction motors are NOT currently in the mandatory CCC catalogue — domestic sale does not require CCC. This is structurally analogous to Japan's DENAN situation: neither country imposes a mandatory third-party product certification scheme on standard industrial-grade three-phase AC motors. Both rely on compliance with technical standards (GB in China, JIS/IEC in Japan) rather than mandatory product certification for this product category.
summary.zh: 在中国，由 CNCA 主管的 CCC（中国强制认证）制度覆盖强制类别的电气产品。一般工业用三相感应电机目前不在强制 CCC 目录范围内——国内销售无需 CCC 认证。这与日本 DENAN 的情况在结构上类似：两国均未对标准工业级三相交流电机实施强制性第三方产品认证制度，均依赖技术标准合规（中国为 GB 标准，日本为 JIS/IEC 标准），而非对该产品类别的强制产品认证。
summary.zht: 在中國，由 CNCA 主管的 CCC（中國強制認證）制度覆蓋強制類別的電氣產品。一般工業用三相感應電機目前不在強制 CCC 目錄範圍內——國內銷售無需 CCC 認證。這與日本 DENAN 的情況在結構上類似：兩國均未對標準工業級三相交流電機實施強制性第三方產品認證制度，均依賴技術標準合規（中國為 GB 標準，日本為 JIS/IEC 標準），而非對該產品類別的強制產品認證。

standards_or_laws: CCC (China Compulsory Certification) catalogue — industrial three-phase motors not currently listed as mandatory

gap.en: For standard industrial three-phase induction motors (200 V+, used in industrial machinery), Japan's DENAN / PSE scheme does not apply — there is no mandatory third-party product certification barrier equivalent to CE marking in the EU. This is a smaller gap than for EU or UK export. The primary market-access mechanisms for Japan are Top Runner efficiency compliance (mandatory, see motorjp-efficiency) and meeting JIS C 4034 technical parameters (de facto expectation). [UNCERTAINTY FLAG: Always verify the current DENAN product schedules on METI's official portal before final compliance determination, as schedules can be amended. The applicability to specific low-voltage single-phase motor variants or motors sold for consumer/household use may differ.]
gap.zh: 对于标准工业三相感应电机（200 V 以上，用于工业机械），日本 DENAN / PSE 制度不适用——不存在相当于欧盟 CE 标志的强制第三方产品认证壁垒，差距小于出口至欧盟或英国。日本市场准入的主要机制是领跑者能效合规（强制性，详见 motorjp-efficiency）和符合 JIS C 4034 技术参数（事实期望）。【不确定性标注：在最终合规判定前，应始终在 METI 官方门户核查最新 DENAN 产品附表，因附表可能修订。低压单相电机变体或用于消费/家用途的电机的适用性可能有所不同。】
gap.zht: 對於標準工業三相感應電機（200 V 以上，用於工業機械），日本 DENAN / PSE 制度不適用——不存在相當於歐盟 CE 標誌的強制第三方產品認證壁障，差距小於出口至歐盟或英國。日本市場准入的主要機制是領跑者能效合規（強制性，詳見 motorjp-efficiency）和符合 JIS C 4034 技術參數（事實期望）。【不確定性標注：在最終合規判定前，應始終在 METI 官方門戶核查最新 DENAN 產品附表，因附表可能修訂。低壓單相電機變體或用於消費/家用途的電機的適用性可能有所不同。】

mandatory_status.target: Not mandatory for standard industrial three-phase motors — DENAN / PSE does not cover this product category in its current schedules. [UNCERTAINTY FLAG: Verify DENAN schedules for specific voltage/use-case.] Top Runner compliance IS mandatory (see motorjp-efficiency).
mandatory_status.cn: Not mandatory — CCC not required for industrial three-phase motors; GB technical standards compliance required for domestic sale

source.publisher: Ministry of Economy, Trade and Industry (METI) Japan

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Most industrial three-phase induction motors do not require PSE / DENAN certification for Japan market access. The mandatory market-access barrier is Top Runner efficiency compliance under 省エネ法. Exporters should verify the current DENAN product schedules on METI's official portal to confirm their specific motor model and voltage rating are out of scope. Do not rely on this comparison alone for final compliance determination.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 大多数工业三相感应电机进入日本市场无需 PSE / DENAN 认证。强制性市场准入壁垒是依据省エネ法的领跑者能效合规。出口商应在 METI 官方门户核查最新 DENAN 产品附表，确认其特定电机型号和电压等级不在范围内。请勿仅依据本对照作出最终合规判断。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 大多數工業三相感應電機進入日本市場無需 PSE / DENAN 認證。強制性市場准入壁障是依據省エネ法的領跑者能效合規。出口商應在 METI 官方門戶核查最新 DENAN 產品附表，確認其特定電機型號和電壓等級不在範圍內。請勿僅依據本對照作出最終合規判斷。

requirement_topic.en: Top Runner importer registration and designated manufacturer obligations
requirement_topic.zh: 领跑者进口商注册及指定制造商义务
requirement_topic.zht: 領跑者進口商登記及指定製造商義務

summary.en: Under the Act on Rationalizing Energy Use (省エネ法), entities that import Top Runner designated products (including three-phase induction motors) into Japan for sale are classified as 'Specified Import Businesses' (特定輸入業者) and must register with METI/ANRE, meet the Top Runner target efficiency values, maintain performance records, and submit annual compliance reports. Foreign manufacturers selling directly to Japan through an importer must ensure their importer fulfils these obligations. This is a procedural market-access requirement with no equivalent in Chinese domestic regulations.
summary.zh: 依据《节能法》（省エネ法），将领跑者指定产品（包括三相感应电机）进口至日本销售的主体被认定为「特定输入业者」，须向 METI/ANRE 进行登记，满足领跑者目标效率值，保存性能记录，并提交年度合规报告。通过进口商向日本直接销售的境外制造商须确保其进口商履行上述义务。这是一项程序性市场准入要求，在中国国内法规中无对应规定。
summary.zht: 依據《節能法》（省エネ法），將領跑者指定產品（包括三相感應電機）進口至日本銷售的主體被認定為「特定輸入業者」，須向 METI/ANRE 進行登記，滿足領跑者目標效率值，保存性能記錄，並提交年度合規報告。通過進口商向日本直接銷售的境外製造商須確保其進口商履行上述義務。這是一項程序性市場准入要求，在中國國內法規中無對應規定。

standards_or_laws: Act on Rationalizing Energy Use (省エネ法, Law No. 49 of 1979, as amended) — Specified Import Business provisions
ANRE (Agency for Natural Resources and Energy) administrative guidance on Top Runner designated products

summary.en: China has no equivalent importer registration or annual energy-efficiency reporting scheme for motors. GB 18613-2020 compliance is enforced through product quality supervision by SAMR/CQC at the manufacturer level. There is no statutory duty on importers of motors into China to register with an energy authority or file annual efficiency compliance reports.
summary.zh: 中国对电机无对应的进口商注册或年度能效报告制度。GB 18613-2020 的合规由市场监管总局（SAMR）/ 中认证中心（CQC）在制造商层面通过产品质量监督实施。中国进口电机的主体无须向能源主管部门注册或提交年度能效合规报告的法定义务。
summary.zht: 中國對電機無對應的進口商登記或年度能效申報制度。GB 18613-2020 的合規由市場監管總局（SAMR）/ 中認證中心（CQC）在製造商層面通過產品質量監督實施。中國進口電機的主體無須向能源主管部門登記或提交年度能效合規申報的法定義務。

standards_or_laws: GB 18613-2020 (enforced by SAMR at manufacturer level — no equivalent import registration duty)

gap.en: The importer registration and annual reporting obligation under 省エネ法 is a procedural gap with no Chinese equivalent. Chinese motor exporters whose Japanese buyers are classified as 'Specified Import Businesses' must ensure: (1) their buyer is registered with ANRE/METI; (2) product efficiency documentation (Top Runner target values, test reports under JIS C 4034-2-1) is supplied to support the importer's annual report; (3) product specifications are maintained and updated if METI revises target values. Failure by the importer to comply can result in METI issuing an improvement order and, ultimately, public disclosure of non-compliance — reputational and commercial risk for both importer and supplier.
gap.zh: 省エネ法项下进口商注册和年度报告义务是一项程序性差距，在中国无对应要求。日本买方被认定为「特定输入业者」的中国电机出口商须确保：(1) 买方已向 ANRE/METI 完成注册；(2) 提供产品效率文件（领跑者目标值、JIS C 4034-2-1 测试报告）以支持进口商的年度报告；(3) 产品规格妥善保存，并在 METI 修订目标值时及时更新。进口商不合规可能导致 METI 发出整改令，最终公开披露违规情况，对进口商和供应商均构成声誉和商业风险。
gap.zht: 省エネ法項下進口商登記和年度申報義務是一項程序性差距，在中國無對應要求。日本買方被認定為「特定輸入業者」的中國電機出口商須確保：(1) 買方已向 ANRE/METI 完成登記；(2) 提供產品效率文件（領跑者目標值、JIS C 4034-2-1 測試報告）以支持進口商的年度申報；(3) 產品規格妥善保存，並在 METI 修訂目標值時及時更新。進口商不合規可能導致 METI 發出整改令，最終公開披露違規情況，對進口商和供應商均構成聲譽和商業風險。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — Specified Import Business registration and annual reporting under 省エネ法 is a legal obligation for importers of Top Runner designated motors into Japan
mandatory_status.cn: Not applicable — no equivalent import registration or annual energy reporting obligation for motor importers in China

source.publisher: Agency for Natural Resources and Energy (ANRE), METI Japan

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese motor exporters must work with their Japanese importer to confirm the importer's registration as a Specified Import Business under 省エネ法 and provide the efficiency test documentation required for the importer's annual compliance report to ANRE/METI. This is a supply-chain procedural obligation that sits above and apart from the technical Top Runner efficiency compliance.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国电机出口商须与日本进口商确认其已依据省エネ法注册为「特定输入业者」，并提供进口商向 ANRE/METI 提交年度合规报告所需的效率测试文件。这是一项供应链程序义务，独立于技术性领跑者能效合规要求之上。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國電機出口商須與日本進口商確認其已依據省エネ法登記為「特定輸入業者」，並提供進口商向 ANRE/METI 提交年度合規申報所需的效率測試文件。這是一項供應鏈程序義務，獨立於技術性領跑者能效合規要求之上。
